query: SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.role, u.clinicaId, u.passwordHash, c.codigo, c.nome FROM users u LEFT JOIN clinicas c ON u.clinicaId = c.id WHERE u.email = 'dreatnu@yahoo.com'; SELECT ea.id, ea.email, ea.clinicaId, ea.role, c.codigo FROM emails_autorizados ea LEFT JOIN clinicas c ON ea.clinicaId = c.id WHERE ea.email = 'dreatnu@yahoo.com'
